headline: LA Rents Fall to a Four-Year Low, But Affordability Remains Out of Reach for Many
summary: Los Angeles County renters are seeing rents fall to their lowest point in four years, but for many, the relief only goes so far. The median asking rent dropped to $2,520 in the first quarter of 2026, according to the Q1 2026 Los Angeles County Rental Report from Realtor.com®, Realtor.com®'s first quarterly rental analysis dedicated to the nation's second-largest metro.
